UI_QuickFits_tooltip_wear: Matches your worn gear to this outfit exactly, unequipping anything not in it first.
UI_QuickFits_tooltip_add: Layers this outfit onto what you are already wearing, replacing only conflicting slots.
UI_QuickFits_tooltip_take_off: Removes only this outfit's worn items and puts them into your inventory.
UI_QuickFits_tooltip_place_container: Moves outfit items into a container, using the selected container first and then the nearest container.
UI_QuickFits_drop_hint_capture: or use Capture Worn to pull from your current gear
UI_QuickFits_drop_hint_release: Release to add dragged wearable items
UI_QuickFits_result_apply_failed: Quick Fits could not apply the selected outfit.
UI_QuickFits_draft_error_wearable_duplic: Only wearable items can be added, and dragged duplicates were ignored.
UI_QuickFits_draft_overlay_wearable_dupl: Only wearable items belong here. Duplicates were ignored.
UI_QuickFits_draft_error_only_wearable: Only wearable items can be added to a Quick Fit.
UI_QuickFits_draft_overlay_only_wearable: Only wearable items can be dropped into an outfit.
UI_QuickFits_draft_error_already_present: Those items are already in this Quick Fit.
UI_QuickFits_draft_overlay_already_prese: That wearable is already in this outfit.
UI_QuickFits_draft_added: Added %1 wearable item(s) to the draft.
UI_QuickFits_status_captured_current: Captured the player's current worn items into the editor.
UI_QuickFits_status_new_draft: Started a new empty outfit draft. Drag wearable items in or use Capture Worn.
UI_QuickFits_status_select_before_delete: Select an outfit before deleting it.
UI_QuickFits_status_delete_failed: Quick Fits could not delete the selected outfit.
UI_QuickFits_status_select_before_wear: Select an outfit before wearing it.
UI_QuickFits_status_select_before_add: Select an outfit before adding it.
UI_QuickFits_status_select_before_place: Select an outfit before placing it in a container.
UI_QuickFits_status_select_before_remove: Select an outfit before taking it off.
UI_QuickFits_error_no_container: No selected or nearby container was available for Quick Fits.
UI_QuickFits_error_save_empty: Select at least one worn item to save this outfit.
UI_QuickFits_error_rename_missing: Enter a name before renaming the outfit.
